tests_pass.evidence: All 3 identity-visibility chromium tests pass (detached styling, detached leave, identity switch restores). No regressions.

implementation_notes: Pure E2E test. Uses two separate browser contexts: Context B authenticates User B first to publish key package, then Context A runs the identity switch flow. User A creates group, invites User B, disconnects. User B authenticates in same context and verifies group is fully interactive (not detached). Test asserts: no detached-overlay, Add Task button visible, Open column visible.
